### Pattern 3: Continuity Is Procedural

Continuity does not show improving or worsening consumer mood. It shows an unresolved measurement arc. The prior persisted digest listed four relevant actions: validate monitor ingestion, suppress zero-denominator SOV, add a continuity caveat, and check adjacent windows. This session contains no saved proof that those actions were completed.

MON-6 is partial because the constructed patterns don't span 3+ distinct time-points (the only continuity is one prior digest) and the digest doesn't take the explicit 'no compound thread' escape with reasoning.
